description: This video explains the differences between hot and cold crypto wallets, detailing their accessibility, security features, and types.
topic_summary: Hot wallets are connected to the Internet, making them convenient for transactions [t=0:48]. Cold wallets store keys offline, providing enhanced security [t=24:48]. The video also categorizes wallets into software and hardware types [t=43:83].
aliases: What is Hot and Cold Crypto Wallets
